findings.title: Q4C SHADOW_DIFF_IN_CANARY_OBSERVATION doubles model spend on 100% of canary-mode traffic
findings.evidence: Both branches (canary primary AND off-bucket-overshoot) fire the OTHER provider in the background unconditionally. Percent gate only decides which provider serves the user; observation always pays the second call.
findings.fix: Either gate observation on bucket-overshoot only, or restrict to true shadow mode with sample rate. Suggest flipping flag to false immediately.

findings.title: Image-gen Q4C observation bypasses the daily 10-image quota
findings.evidence: checkImageRateLimit ticks Firestore counter once for the primary sidecar call; Q4C background runGenkitSafe generates a SECOND $0.04 image with no quota check. Daily ceiling effectively doubled.
findings.fix: Move quota gate into model-call wrappers OR suppress Q4C observation on visual-aid + avatar (signal-to-cost ratio poor).

findings.title: UsageTracker only logs; no budget enforcement layer exists
findings.evidence: trackGemini / trackImageGen / trackGrounding write logs + Firestore counters but no read-and-reject path. gemini-2.5-pro (assignment-assessor, $5/1M output) lands uncapped per user per day.
findings.fix: Add enforceDailyBudget(userId, type) with per-plan caps; throw 429 before model call.

findings.title: Q4C observation lacks sampling rate — 100% sample for statistically negligible signal gain
findings.fix: Add SHADOW_DIFF_SAMPLE_RATE (default 0.05) and Math.random() gate around each observation block.

findings.title: agent_shadow_diffs/{date}/{agent} subcollections have no TTL
findings.estimated_growth: ~2GB/month at canary scale; aggregator read cost grows linearly
findings.fix: Apply Firestore TTL policy on createdAt with 30-day retention.

findings.title: Assignment-assessor uses gemini-2.5-pro with no per-session cost cap
findings.evidence: 30-student worksheet batch at 2-3 images each = 60-90 Pro multimodal calls. No throttle.
findings.fix: Cap N images per assessment session; integrate with enforceDailyBudget.

findings.title: Persona-pulse 15-min 503 retry can outlive operator-intended kill
findings.fix: Distinguish killswitch 503 (stop polling) from transient 503 (15-min retry).

clean_beats: qa/embedding-cache/ — directory does not exist, embeddings live in Firestore vector field
Image-gen retry loops — none in visual-aid-designer.ts or avatar-generator.ts
Sarvam STT retries — capped at MAX_RETRIES=2
daily-briefing — single daily cron with bounded call structure
voice-to-text Gemini script-mismatch retry — bounded to 1 retry
out_of_scope_needs_prod_access: Cloud Billing BigQuery export query for last-7-days SKU breakdown
Live counts of agent_shadow_diffs docs per agent per day
Actual call volumes per agent to validate projected monthly delta
